def positive_weakref_dereferenced_without_live_check():
    rule_id = "weakref_dereferenced_without_live_check"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "weakref.ref() called and result used without checking for None, potential AttributeError."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
